entry.title: Re: Tutorial / Not able to find 'Define the API' menu path
entry.content:
Hi, this is quite old but today I faced the same issue.

I figured out, that in BTP I needed to add the role collection APIManagement.Selfservice.Administrator to my user. After that the missing activity was present in Integration suite (and after reloading).

For further reference see here: https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/configuring-user-access

Best regards, Dirk

entry.title: Re: PO delivery address
entry.content: Thank you : ) !

entry.title: Re: Calculating Time Interval between Two Time Feilds
entry.content: First, you have to involve the Date because start and end date might be different and DSP doesn't support Time type. second, you can replcae the function DAYS_BETWEEN with SECONDS_BETWEEN to get the seconds, then convert the seconds to hours you want

entry.title: Re: Technical RFC Integration On-Premise-EWM 9.5 to Cloud...
entry.content: Hi Simon, thanks for your input. To pick up your points.

entry.title: it_parameter empty in EXECUTE_ACTION method
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In the DPC_EXT class, I have redefined the interface method /IWBEP/IF_MGW_APPL_SRV_RUNTIME~EXECUTE_ACTION, but the import parameter it_parameter is empty, preventing data from being saved or updated.

The strange part is that in the GET_ENTITYSET method, the parameter is correctly filled with the keys.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Any insights would be appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP 分析云新功能速递 - 作业监控器
entry.content:
我非常高兴地向大家介绍作业监控器（Job Monitor），它已经随我们2025年第一季度更新版本（QRC1）一起发布！

借助作业监控器，业务用户和管理员将能够更轻松地获取后台作业以及整体流程的状态信息。

 

当前挑战

目前，由于缺乏对多步操作的监控工具，导致多步操作执行过程缺乏透明度。

数据操作、数据导入/导出以及智能预测的监控功能分散，使得用户难以在系统范围内全面监控作业。

并且当用户触发一个多步操作时，他们需要在不同的监控器之间来回切换以查看状态，这使得整个过程变得繁琐。作业状态、持续时间和错误分析分散在各个监控器中，使得用户难以解读整个流程的完整状态。

此外，当用户对某些长时间运行的作业产生疑问，并希望确定其持续时间延长的根本原因（例如，系统繁忙）时，往往很难在任何特定时刻获得作业执行的整体概览。

作业监控器

作业监控器为监控SAP Analytics Cloud（SAC）中的后台作业提供了一个集中的方法。2025年QRC1版本包括了对数据操作作业和多步操作作业的监控功能，未来版本会进一步将更多的作业类型整合到作业监控器中。

借助作业监控器，用户可以轻松监控、排查故障并分析SAP Analytics Cloud（SAC）作业的性能，从而帮助他们简化工作流程，优化数据操作和数据多步操作的配置。

丰富的筛选功能使用户能够从不同角度灵活地搜索作业。例如：

  • 通过“启动日期”筛选器，查看特定时间段内的作业
  • 通过“总持续时间”筛选器，查看长时间运行的作业
  • 通过“状态”筛选器，分析失败的作业
  • 通过“启动依据”筛选器，按日历查看计划作业

作业监控器为作业提供了一个全方位视图，包括作业的触发来源、总执行时间、触发作业的人员以及触发时间等详细信息。在详细页面中，您可以深入了解作业的持续时间、变更记录、参数值等更多内容。

各种的监控页面为不同作业类型和不同作业级别分别提供了定制化的洞察。

  • 为数据操作和多步操作专门设计的监控页面为每种作业类型提供了针对性的洞察。
  • “所有作业”页面为所有数据操作和多步操作作业提供了全面的概览。
  • “主要作业”页面清晰列出了所有一级作业，包括一级数据操作和多步操作作业。嵌套在多步操作或一级数据操作中的作业不会在此页面显示。

高级文本搜索功能支持在作业监控器中进行全局搜索，覆盖作业列表和详细信息页面。借助这一功能，您可以轻松找到任何与作业相关的信息，例如使用了特定维度参数的作业。

支持多种用户角色。

  • 业务用户可以查看他们启动的所有作业、在日历中别人共享给他们的作业，以及他们拥有目标版本的数据操作作业。
  • 管理员或流程所有者可以全面监控所有作业，从而能够全面掌握整个租户的作业状态。

与之前的数据操作监控器相比，作业列表所显现的性能在初始加载和后续分页方面都得到了显著提升。

注意：作业监控器是数据操作监控器的接替产品。

使用作业监控器监控多步操作

作业监控器中的多步操作监控器为多步操作作业提供了完全的透明度和可追溯性。

在专门的多步操作页面上，您可以获取所有多步操作作业的概览。业务用户可以查看他们拥有的所有多步操作作业，而管理员用户可以查看整个租户范围内的所有多步操作作业。

通过选择一个特定的作业，您可以深入了解其详细状态。这包括查看执行进度、分步作业详情、已导入的记录、已变更的记录、参数值等信息。

数据操作步骤的详细状态已集成到多步操作监控器中，用户无需再在不同的监控工具之间来回切换。

对于多步操作中的数据导入步骤，如果有被拒绝的数据，您还可以直接从作业监控器轻松下载被拒绝的数据，而无需切换到数据管理页面。不过，如果您需要了解有关导入作业设置的更多详细信息，仍然可以导航到数据管理页面。

结论

总之，SAP Analytics Cloud 的 2025年QRC1版本引入了作业监控器，这是一个集中式的工具，简化了业务用户和管理员的作业监控工作。它整合了分散的监控功能，提升了透明度和效率。

 

原文链接: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/improved-job-transparency-job-monitor-in-sap-analytics-cloud/ba-p/13966169

原文作者：Sarau Shen

entry.title: Re: Technical RFC Integration On-Premise-EWM 9.5 to Cloud...
entry.content: Point 1) The general guideline for the Integration part on the -Premise system points out to use RFC Connection Type 3 (Connection to ABAP system) - How would I setup the WebSocket RFC within the EWM 9.5 On Premise. What setting is required then on the Public Cloud system to be able to consume the RFC calls?,

entry.title: Re: Create button not visible
entry.content:
Insert the following code in your schema.cds file

@odata.draft.enabled
@odata.draft.bypass
entity entityname {
fields...
...
}


Deploy your code...
Run...

entry.title: Is it possible to hard-code goals in the goal template?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to ask by any chance, if anyone from here experience hard coded the goals for each category in the xml template?

For example, I have financial and customer as categories and then core and consolidated are the goals with specific weight each.

Financial:

  • Core - 10%
  • Consolidated - 10%

    Customer:

    • Communication - 5%
    • Engagement - 10%

       

      And then once I go to the goal section, it is already there and can be use already.

      I just want to confirm if this idea is possible.

      Thank you!

      Best Regards,

      Gelo

      #Performance #Goals #PMGM SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals

entry.title: Re: Technical RFC Integration On-Premise-EWM 9.5 to Cloud...
entry.content:
If connection type 3 should be used, then you need to use option 2).

I don't know which ABAP version EWM 9.5 is based on, and if WebSocket RFC is also available for your specific integration scenario.

entry.title: Re: ABAP ADT parallel locking issue for ABAP Classes
entry.content:
Hi @ThFiedler ,

is there still no way to implement this requirement in ADT? As you write, there were already ideas for this 9 years ago. It is simply totally unfortunate if the whole class is locked in a transport request, even though you only want to edit a single method. For this reason, I work with the SAP GUI again when maintaining classes that are already active. Surely it must be possible to solve this? I will try out @Tamas_Hoznek's suggestion.

Regards Frank

entry.title: Re: Technical RFC Integration On-Premise-EWM 9.5 to Cloud...
entry.content: Point 2) We tried this variant via our cloud connector, but testing the service channel fails with error message "Service Channel could not be opened"

KR,

entry.title: We have a requirement where we are moving from SAP ECC VIM to S/4HANA VIM Public cloud. any ref doc.
entry.content: We have a requirement where we are moving from SAP ECC VIM to S/4HANA VIM Public cloud any reference documents and recommendations.

entry.title: Problem Statement: Unable to Deploy CAPM Project on Cloud Foundry – Service Instance Not Found
entry.content:
Dear Exports,

I have developed an SAP CAPM (Cloud Application Programming Model) application that facilitates salary uploads from Excel to SAP Public Cloud. I followed the official SAP tutorials to develop and deploy my application:

SAP CAPM Introduction Tutorial

Deploy to Cloud Foundry Tutorial

I successfully generated the TESTAPP_1.0.0.mtar file and attempted to deploy it using:

cf deploy /home/user/projects/TESTAPP/mta_archives/TESTAPP_1.0.0.mtar -f

However, the deployment fails with the following error:

Error monitoring creation or update of services: Error creating service "TESTAPP-auth" from offering "xsuaa" and plan "application": Error creating application null (Error parsing xs-security.json data: Inconsistent xs-security.json: Invalid xsappname "TESTAPP-Qorix India Pvt Ltd_qorix-yfvzj2ew_ext-dev": May only include characters 'a'-'z', 'A'-'Z', '0'-'9', '_', '-', '\', and '/'.)

Project Setup Details

  • I have not created any entities under the db folder. Instead, my project consists of:
    • Service definitions (.cds and .js files) under the srv folder
    • Fiori app under the app folder
  • I successfully generated the .mtar file and followed all steps mentioned in the SAP tutorial.
  • Deployment fails during the xsuaa service creation

Actions Performed:

     1. Updated mta.yaml as per the tutorial.
     2. Added the required build script in TESTAPP/APP/Project1/package.json.
     3. Successfully generated the .mtar file.
     4. Attempted deployment via cf deploy, but encountered the above error


Questions:

 

  1. How can I correctly format the xsappname in xs-security.json to avoid invalid characters?
  2. What are the best practices for deploying a CAPM project to CloudFoundry with xsuaa authentication?
  3. What is the best way to handle space-containing organization names in the xsappname field?
  4. Does my project require a db folder with entities for successful deployment, or can I deploy only with services(srv) and a Fiori app(app)?

entry.title: Secure Kafka Integration on SAP Integration Suite: Advantco Kafka Private Link Proxy with Confluent
entry.content:
Introduction

As enterprises adopt real-time, event-driven architectures, Apache Kafka plays a central role in managing high-throughput data streams. Integrating Kafka with SAP Integration Suite opens new possibilities for event-driven business processes—but doing this securely in the cloud can be a challenge.

By combining the Advantco Kafka Adapter for SAP CPI with the Private Link Service on SAP BTP, organizations can securely integrate SAP Integration Suite with Confluent Cloud Kafka clusters, leveraging private networking on AWS and Azure. This approach avoids exposing services over the public internet, meeting strict security and compliance requirements.

 

The Integration Challenge

In traditional setups, Kafka clients—like SAP Integration Suite —must connect directly to Kafka brokers over public endpoints. This connection typically relies on public DNS resolution, meaning the broker’s IP or hostname is exposed on the internet.

For on-premise Kafka installations, customers often configure SAP Cloud Connector to allow SAP CPI tenants to reach Kafka brokers securely. However, this requires additional setup and complexity, especially in hybrid environments.

Confluent Cloud, a fully managed Kafka service, simplifies event streaming. When deployed with Private Networking, it allows private, secure communication between your infrastructure and Confluent Cloud clusters—without public exposure.

 

Enter SAP Private Link Service + Advantco Kafka Adapter

When running Confluent Cloud Kafka clusters with Private Link Service enabled, direct communication between SAP CPI and the Kafka brokers isn’t possible—since CPI tenants can’t reach private endpoints directly.

To overcome this, Advantco provides a Kafka BTP Application, deployed on SAP BTP Cloud Foundry, which acts as an intermediary (proxy). It securely forwards requests from the Advantco Kafka Adapter (on SAP Integration Suite) to the Kafka broker via SAP Private Link Service.

Why Private Link Service Matters

Without Private Link:

  • SAP Integration Suite would need to connect over the public internet
  • Potential compliance and security issues arise
  • More complicated networking (VPNs, NATs, etc.)

With Private Link + Advantco BTP App:

  • Private, direct, secure communication
  • No traffic ever leaves the cloud provider’s internal network
  • Simpler, cleaner network architecture

Key Benefits of This Approach

  • Secure Connectivity: No public internet exposure, reducing risk.
  •  Low Latency & High Performance: Direct, private links reduce network hops.
  • Compliance-Friendly: Meets SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR standards.
  • Multi-Cloud & Hybrid Ready: Supports AWS, Azure, and GCP with SAP BTP.
  • Simplified Network Management: No need for VPNs or NAT gateways.

 

Solution Architecture Overview

  1. Advantco Kafka Adapter (SAP Integration Suite)
    • Sends produce requests to Advantco Kafka BTP App
    • Cannot directly access PrivateLink-enabled brokers
  2. Advantco Kafka BTP Application (SAP BTP Cloud Foundry)
    • Acts as the bridge between SAP Integration Suite and Kafka
    • Deployed in a BTP space with SAP Private Link enabled
    • Forwards requests to Kafka brokers securely
  3. SAP Private Link Service
    • Provides private connectivity from SAP BTP to cloud providers
    • Ensures communication with Kafka brokers over private endpoints only
  4. Confluent Cloud Kafka (Private Networking Enabled)
    • Kafka cluster runs in AWS or Azure, accessible via PrivateLink endpoints only
    • No public IP addresses or DNS records are used

Picture 1: Architecture Diagram of the Kafka Private Link Proxy Service on SAP BTP

Flow description:

- Advantco Kafka adapter: an SAP Integration Suite adapter with Private Link Service enabled.

Picture 2: Configure of the Advantco Kafka channel to use Private Link.

- Advantco Kafka Private Link Proxy is an application deployed on BTP Cloud Foundry Space used to receive requests from Advantco Kafka adapter on SAP Integration Suite.

Picture 3: The Advantco Kafka Private Link Proxy application in SAP BTP

- SAP Private Link Service: enables secure, private communication between SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and cloud providers (AWS, Azure, GCP) without exposing traffic to the public internet.

- Confluent Cloud with Private Networking: a private cluster bound with Cloud Provider’s Private Link Service. The cluster can be accessed through Private Endpoint only.

 

AWS and Azure Deployment Scenarios

AWS Deployment

  • Confluent Cloud on AWS provides PrivateLink endpoints in the customer’s AWS VPC
  • SAP BTP on AWS connects via SAP Private Link Service to those PrivateLink endpoints
  • Kafka clients (Advantco Kafka BTP App) connect securely over AWS’s internal network
  • PrivateLink setup requested and managed through Confluent Cloud Console
  • Requires SAP BTP and Kafka broker to be in the same or peered AWS region

Azure Deployment

  • Confluent Cloud on Azure provides Private Endpoints in a VNet
  • SAP BTP on Azure uses SAP Private Link Service to connect to those Private Endpoints
  • Kafka clients (Advantco Kafka BTP App) connect securely via Microsoft’s private network
  • Private Networking enabled and configured via Confluent Cloud Console
  • Requires SAP BTP and Kafka broker to be in the same Azure region

 

Conclusion

By leveraging Advantco Kafka Adapter, SAP Private Link Service, and Confluent Cloud Private Networking, businesses can securely integrate Kafka into their SAP Integration Suite based processes without compromising performance or compliance.

entry.title: Re: Billing doc Creation idoc
entry.content:
If you would like to create an Invoice in SAP system based on details from external system, look up for SAP General Billing Interface. 

This functionality is available both in ECC and S4 HANA. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/7b24a64d9d0941bda1afa753263d9e39/0871b6535fe6b74ce10000000a174cb4.html

entry.title: APIs for me.sap.com
entry.content:
Hello experts,

could you please help me with a question regarding me.sap.com portal... Are there any APIs available, where could I find their definitions? Specifically I'm interested in API which provides functionality around roadmap viewer, like searching for a content there, ...

Many thanks for your support,

Milan

entry.title: SAP B1 Web Client Extension Not Working
entry.content:
We developed an extension as mentioned in the learning hub "Developing Extensions for SAP Business One and the Web Client" and Unit 2 section Creating UI Extensions to Customize SAP Business One, Web Client Views. But when we try to click on the button but no information showing after clicking the button which is developed as mentioned in the learning content. When we do the inspect or troubleshoot that time we found out that its redirect the url to https://<hostname>:5443/svcl/b1s/v2/CompanyService_GetCompanyInfo. But there is nothing mentioned about SVCL redirection i can see other redirection like tcli which is working on SAP B1 web client but i am not able to find any documentation or content regarding svcl redirection for extension.

Regards,

Tushar Nathvani

#SAPBusinessOneWebClient #SAPBusinessOne SAP Business One SAP Business One Extensibility

entry.title: Re: Setting Up the Latest Benefits Enrollment Experience: Step-by-Step Configuration and Helpful Tip
entry.content: Not all companies/legal entities have the same enrollment dates for their benefits. Is there any way around this?

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Multistage (Multilevel) intercompany sales and multistage intercompany stock transfer are available on SAP’s external roadmap:
Multistage intercompany sales
Multistage intercompany stock transfer

Current plan is to deliver both with S/4HANA 2025 FPS01 (Q1 2026). 
There won’t be any downport option to S/4HANA 2022 or S/4HANA 2023.

The first delivered version of multistage will cover similar scenarios that are covered by advanced, means:

  • Sell-from-stock items are supported
  • Batch split is supported
  • Make-to-Order (with or without variant configuration) is not supported
  • Engineer-to-Order is not supported
  • Sales BOMs are not supported
  • aATP creating subitems is not supported
  • Non-valuated materials / non-stock materials / service materials are not supported

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: Re: Creating 2 Result Analysis version with different RA Method for 2 ledgers
entry.content: Hello Yannick, hello Paulo, did you finally get to a conclusion on this topic, e have the exact same requirement and so far we could not succeed to have a separate posting on dedicated ledger depending on RA Version. Is ti possible or not ? Thank you in advance for your feedback. Regards, Thibaud

entry.title: Do you know SAP Sales Cloud version 2?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 learning journey.

Overview
In this course you will learn about SAP Sales Cloud version 2 from a business user’s perspective. Learn how the solution is used by a sales representative as well as a sales manager in their daily tasks.

Learning objectives

  • Introducing the solution and learning the basics of navigating it
  • Understanding features like guided selling, task management, visit management and more from a Sales Representative's perspective
  • Understanding features like KPI evaluation, forecasting, pipeline management and more from a Sales Managers perspective
  • Exploring Machine learning and Gen AI features like CX AI Toolkit.
  • Understanding features of MS teams integration and relationship Intelligence features
  • Exploring the features of the Mobile Application

Prerequisites

  • Basic Knowledge of CRM Sales Processes

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: APIs for me.sap.com
entry.content: Depending on what exactly you need, you could try this page https://api.sap.com/content-type/API/apis/all

entry.title: BTP useless lock error message
entry.content:
Working on BTP, I get this error message when a colleague is editing an object.

This message is especially useless:

  • the technical username has no identifying information
  • the suggestion to use SM12 on a system where the SAP GUI is not even allowed is rich indeed

Is there a way around it? I mean other than asking in the local chat who is doing what where.

entry.title: Re: Setting Up the Latest Benefits Enrollment Experience: Step-by-Step Configuration and Helpful Tip
entry.content: Hi @Patricia88 You can create one template for each legal entity/company if dates are different.

entry.title: Re: CO10 : CO684 - You cannot make an assignment to make-...
entry.content:
Did you already perform the checks of 1929029 - FAQ: Settlement rules in production order for your case?

  • Check whether the settlement profile permits settlement to the required recipient.
  • There must only be one mandatory recipient in the settlement profile.
  • Check the material type of the header material. The system can only create a settlement rule automatically if the material is managed with values (see Customizing transaction OMS2).

entry.title: Re: Datasphere: Join Condition using a range in Graphical...
SAP Build Process Automation - ProcessAutomationDelegate explained (Security and Roles too)
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Couple of months ago we introduced the ProcessAutomationDelegate. Let's find out what it brings for Governance among other Role Collections.

Typical Tasks

While setting your tenant, questions can quickly come for knowing WHO is the admin and WHO is not. Admin can do EVERYTHING within SAP Build Process Automation. Here an overview of the different tasks assigned by user profile with the corresponding Role Collections:

ProcessAutomationDelegate?

In a nutshell, ProcessAutomationDelegate is like a ProcessAutomationDeveloper without the right adding a project or add anything without being granted in a container such as Project or Environment. This role collection is convenient when:

  • you need to assign a user to monitor instances and jobs execution
  • you need to assign a user to a specific project without giving the opportunity to create a new project
  • you need to assign a user to a specific environment without giving too much responsibility

Combined with Shared Environment Privileges, you can customize your governance rules.

  • More information about Role and Role Collections for SAP Build Process Automation is available here.
  • More information about Shared Environment rights is available here.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Transition guidelines from Public Environment to Shared Environments
entry.content:
Dear Community,

In a previous blog post "How to transition to Shared Environments - getting started" we provided a getting started on how to transition from Public Environment to Shared Environment. Let's discover the "transition guidelines":

Is the project currently deployed on public environment?

  • If the project is not currently deployed on a public environment, you can simply create a shared environment and deploy.
  • If the project is currently deployed on a public environment and you don't need to keep the past instances (typically in a development tenant) you should consider:
    • Undeploy on public environment
    • Deploy on a shared environment and test the outcome
  • If the project is currently deployed on a public environment and you need to keep the past instances (typically in a Test or Production tenant) you should consider:
    • Deploy on a shared environment and test the outcome first
    • Stop using on public environment

Are you using "API Trigger" (*)?

Let's see the difference between a Process/Workflow deployed within a Public Environment compared to a Shared Environment:

  • When a process is deployed within the Public Environment, you can click on "Start Instance" to test your workflow, and quickly after the process is started
  • When the SAME process is deployed within a Shared Environment, clicking on "Start Instance" won't be possible and you'll end up with an error.

How to fix (**)...

  1. Open the corresponding process
  2. Add a trigger
  3. Select API Trigger
  4. Provide a name
  5. Your process contains now an API Trigger

How to test...

You can now click the "start instance"

How to call an API Trigger with Environment?

Calling an API with an environment means an extra parameter:

Example with an Action Project

Using your favorite API development tool, you'll need:

  • Add the environment parameter
  • Add an API Key
  • Test!

Development Tenant VS. Production Tenant

It's a good practice to create on both tenants the same environment id (identifier). The only difference between the two tenants would be the API Keys.

More information about:

  • API Keys - help topic
  • Processes and Workflows within Environment - help topic
  • Manage Destinations - help topic
  • Triggers - help topic
  • Add an API trigger to a project - help topic

entry.title: Re: CDS View for Pricing Condition Tables in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear @AndreeBT,

could you please check if CDS View I_PurgPrcgCndnRecdValidity would fulfill your requirement?

 

best regards,

Marius

entry.title: how get email body for billing document all configurations have been done but no body
entry.content:
Hi ,

We have mantained the configuration for body of email for billing documents , we have used custom output type in NACE we have set everything correct .I also checked SBCOMS_SEND_REQUEST_CREATE 

and created an implict enhancement but it does not work  the break point doesnt get there . Any other suggestions on how to make it work using ABAP .

 

 

Best regards,

Pradeep.

entry.content:
Dear Varun,

I suggest you ask this question to support team/component LOD-ANA-AQU.
You can raise a support case as explained in following SAP note.

1296527 - How to create a support case for SAP Support - SAP for Me

Regards,
Riccardo

entry.title: Inventory Posting of stock count items row limits

Hi All

I would like to ask if there is an increase in row limits for Inventory Posting of stock count items in SAP version 10 as the previous version 9 limits the rows to 999?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: I registered for the CER006 but had medical issues di...

Hi @TAMBONGPETER 
Please create a case in our ticket system the assigned agent will then analyze your case and revert back to you with a proposed solution.

Margit

entry.title: Re: What is all about Authorization Server (OAuth) SSO introduced in SAP BusinessObjects BI 4.3 SP02
entry.content:
Hi @SureshKottur 

Not quite sure, I got all the things what you are talking... probably you can raise a support incident, and I believe, our support colleagues will be able to guide you on this, if the issue is in our purview. 

Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Re: Intercompany matching and reconciliation (ICMR) - per...
entry.content:
Hi @YZASHEV,

In OP 2025, no such errors if you click Auto Match for a period with reconciliation closed status or any of its earlier periods.

Instead, for the closed period, the system still loads latest data into ICMR from source table (e.g. ACDOCA) without executing matching, and manual assignment/unassignment are still prevented for period or unit pairs with reconciliation closed status. For any of its prior periods with open status, matching and assignment can be done without restriction. 

For more information, see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/26167a064a84434589dd9e997a2204e7.html?version=2502.500 

Let me know if you have further questions. Thanks!

Grace

entry.title: How to convert already created Regular Employee(BUP003) to Contract Employee(BBP005) or vice-versa
entry.content:
We want to know how to convert already created Regular Employee(BUP003) to Contract Employee(BBP005) or vice-versa.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to convert already created Regular Employee(BUP00...
entry.content:
To convert a contingent employee (BBP005) to internal employee (BUP003) or vice versa:

1)Open the worker in Manage Workforce app.

2) Select the toggle button of the work agreement and click on 'Create' button.

3)In the pop up, select 'Transfer or Rehire'.

4)Fill the details according to requirement and submit

Once this is done, a new work agreement will be created with the new role and rest of the details in the employee BP will remain intact.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Not able to preview app in BAS
entry.content:
Hi Ramin,

As a less disruptive workaround, I propose deleting only the ARBE cookie instead of clearing all history and cookies from the browser.
In order to delete the ARBE cookie in Chrome:
    •    Open Developer Tools (F12) → Application → Cookies
    •    Select port<8080/8888>-workspaces-ws-<wsid>.<bas-url> domain and delete ARBE cookie. 
    •    Refresh the browser.

Thanks,
Ira

entry.title: Re: Not able to preview app in BAS
entry.content:
Hi Ramin,

As a less disruptive workaround, I propose deleting only the ARBE cookie instead of clearing all history and cookies from the browser.
In order to delete the ARBE cookie in Chrome:
    •    Open Developer Tools (F12) → Application → Cookies
    •    Select port<8080/8888>-workspaces-ws-<wsid>.<bas-url> domain and delete ARBE cookie. 
    •    Refresh the browser.

Thanks,
Ira

entry.title: Re: Billing doc Creation idoc
entry.content: What's your exact requirement, ususal logical message is INVOIC 'Invoice/Billing Document'

entry.title: Re: SOST emails sent from which program
entry.content: we have not run a SCOT trace yet as this will take up performance. The issue here is that we have alot of age old jobs probably running in the background and generating emails which are probably not valid anymore hence we want to see if there is any way possible to track back to where it is originating from

entry.title: Re: Issue with FSM Data
entry.content: I did connect FSM to SAC and read the SAC objects via DSP. Otherwise the batching does not work. An influence is opened

entry.title: Re: What is all about Authorization Server (OAuth) SSO introduced in SAP BusinessObjects BI 4.3 SP02
entry.content:
Hi @satyapaul 

No from BI Platform side... but probably from the Authorization server side (IDP provider side) there might be already a solution or can build a custom solution according to your IDP and their support.

However, BI Platform will detect automatically when the user is trying to use the token and prompts to re-authorize if it got expired. This happens on the fly.

 

Regards, 

Venkat.

entry.title: Re: Video series on flexible programming model for SAP Fiori elements
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are observing challenges with opening the explorer page Flexible Programming Model Explorer. Can you please advise on when it could be made available? Or at least point us to an alternate reference

Regards,

Saritha

entry.title: How can i use a component of a table parameter of a BAPI as an Result Data Object in BRF+?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

i would like to use a component of a table of a BAPI as an Result Data Object in BRF+.

The BAPI is: BAPI_BUPA_ADDRESS_GETDETAIL
And i would like to have the component E_MAIL of the table parameter BAPIADSMTP as the Result Data Object of the BRF+ Expression.

There are some screenshots of my BRF+ Expression. I'm using a procedure call.

I've created a table Data Object with the structure of BAPIADSMTP and used E_MAIL as Result Data Object and also as assigned value. This did not work.

This is the Table Data Object that i have created:

Is it even possible to use a component of a table parameter as an result data object? ..or do i have to modify the BAPI to do so?

Thank you so much for your help!

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers: Word Search Challenge
entry.content:
PROCESSGENERATION

Looking forward to the feature in process automation!

entry.title: Re: Video series on flexible programming model for SAP Fiori elements

Try the link without an extra / 

https://ui5.sap.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/rte/rteSection

It works fine for me right now 🙂

entry.title: How to mass upload project demands.
entry.content:
Is there any functionality to upload demands for multiple material demands at once through the app 'Manage Project Demands'.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to mass upload project demands.
entry.content:
The API Project Demand can be used to upload multiple material demands.

Please refer to the link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/988903b47d7040f6ac4ec02e44bb58e4/c709707bbfc842dfaafb66d454784a73.html

https://api.sap.com/api/API_PROJECTDEMAND_0001/resource/Material_Demand

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Restricted measure not having opt...
entry.content: I tried that. And it didn't work. I'm not entire sure how this happened. But it appears that the none fiscal Date had a a Fiscal hierarchy. Despite a non-fiscal hierarchy. Not sure what caused this.

entry.title: Why Time New Roman font gets converted to MinionPro-Regular?
entry.content:
I’m using Adobe LiveCycle Designer to create a PDF document that includes Tajik language letters (Cyrillic extension). In the editor, I select Times New Roman as the font, and the Tajik-specific letters display correctly (see attached screenshot)

 

However, when I generate the PDF, the font changes to MinionPro-Regular, and the Tajik letters appear distorted (see attached screenshot).
How can I ensure the PDF retains Times New Roman and correctly displays Tajik characters? Any settings or workarounds in Adobe LiveCycle Designer or SAP to fix this?

entry.title: Re: Factory Action on multiple instances does not refresh...
entry.content:
Hi @jheisler , 

1. You can follow the option 1 as mentioned by @ClearQueries by adding local annotation inside fiori project. That will surely work. Also, remember to empty cache and hard refresh in your browser to ensure the updated OData annotation is used by Fiori.

2. Ideally factory action should automatically refresh the LRP Fiori page. At least for me it works. Please check the demo CDS entity DEMO_RAP_FACTORY_ACTION to get more help. 

Thanks,

Mainak

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Users Cannot See Their Own Contingent Worker Profile...
entry.content:
Hi,

No, this is not about parallel employments. I am referring to contingent workers who were later hired as regular employees. In Employee Profile or People Profile, within the header (banner), you should be able to switch between the two profiles (contingent worker and regular employee).

However, the issue is that employees cannot see their own contingent worker profile, even though administrators can see both profiles for other employees.
See the picture below.

entry.title: Re: CO10 : CO684 - You cannot make an assignment to make-...
entry.content: Thanks for your response! I have already performed the necessary checks, and everything appears to be in order. In fact, I am using the standard settlement profile PP01. Please let me know if any additional checks are required. Thank you!

entry.title: Crystal Runtimes - .NET Project and Export Options
entry.content:
Hello

I am using Crystal Runtimes in a .net project I am building. 

I use this to determine my suitable format and the extension

        private string GetFileExtension(ExportFormatType format)
        {
            switch (format)
            {
                case ExportFormatType.PortableDocFormat: return "pdf";
                case ExportFormatType.Excel:
                case ExportFormatType.ExcelRecord: return "xls";
                case ExportFormatType.WordForWindows: return "doc";
                default: return "dat";
            }
        }

Anyway, I have a report that has a Page and Report Header.

I want to be able to export in two methods.

One in to XLSX format with all the report headers, page headers included (plus data)

One in to CSV (or XLSX format) that includes page headers and data only. Often page headers are used for column headings if there is no grouping.

I am struggling to find a way to do this in the existing runtimes? Is this a limitation or can this be achieved, please?

I have tried fiddling with 

var excelOptions = new ExcelFormatOptions();

But it seems limited in what it can do.

I can achieve the desired results within Crystal Reports 2020 on my machine, when designing the report - I can export. 

Microsoft Excel (XLSX) gives me the first result

Microsoft Excel - Data Only (XLSX) gives me the second result (when I untick 'Simplify Page Headers')

I'd welcome any insight.

entry.title: Re: Succession Matrix Grid Report - Tips on Configuration and Troubleshooting
entry.content:
Hi Ruby,

Many thanks for the article.

Is it possible to change the 9 box matrix grid into either 4 or 6 box grid report? We have a business requirement from the business to relook on smaller matrix grid instead of 9. I would like to know whether this is possible to achieve?

Many thanks

Govind

entry.title: SAP MDG: I can't create a validation rule after deleting the existing one
entry.content:
Hi all,

could you help me please with this case:

I had a validation rules in SAP MDG for BP, but for some reason I deleted the existing CHECK_AD_POSTAL (function), because all afterwards created rules  did not work. So I deleted it and marked it for deletion with the hope that I can create a new one and begin my journey about Creating Validation Rules from the beginning.

Now my problem is, if I try to create a function with the name: CHECK_AD_POSTAL I get an error message that: Name CHECK_AD_POSTAL has already been used.

Could you tell me please what shold I do so that I can create again a function for the entity AD_POSTAL?

Thank you in advance for your help! 

BR
Umar

entry.title: Re: Posting Group Journal Entry App ISSUE
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. I have followed the operation you replied, but it still doesn't work.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025
entry.content:
Hi @Girinaath_Dayal & @venkata1965 

There seems to be a technical challenge with upgrade guide, and it will be fixed soon. I have already written about upgrade paths in my blog. Here is the diagram for your quick reference. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

If you are on BI 4.2 and your landscape operating system is supported with BI 2025 version, then you can do a in-place update. Same is the case with BI 4.3 landscapes as well.

Important points to note

As the BI 2025 installer is upgraded to 64-bit...  

  1. Uninstallation of BI 2025 and then maintenance operations on Base version will not work.
  2. For Addons to work, it is mandatory to update to the corresponding 64-Bit version, which is supported for BI 2025 platform version.

entry.title: Corporate Carbon Footprint Calculation in SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
Overview

The Corporate Carbon Footprint Calculator, a feature introduced as part of a major update to SAP Sustainability Control Tower in June 2024, allows customers to calculate carbon footprints for various business activities using pre-configured emission factors. This functionality empowers organizations to efficiently track, manage, and reduce their greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by automating the calculation processes for diverse operational activities.

Prerequisites

  1. SAP Sustainability Control Tower subscription
  2. Enabling Corporate Carbon Footprint Calculation in subaccount level
  3. Assigning user roles

Note: -

Complete the booster (automatic configuration) or manual configuration in the subaccount where you have a subscription of SAP Sustainability Control Tower. Don't add it to a subaccount that already has a subscription to SAP Sustainability Footprint Management

Process Flow

1. Update Master Data

Users will see the status notification “2 issues found” on the “Manage Master Data” app (refer the image-01) when using the Corporate Carbon Footprint (CCF) functionality in SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT) for the first time, either after completing the CCF booster scenario or following manual configuration.

Steps to update the master data

There are two different scenarios;

  1. The legal entity has already been imported and is in use.
  2. The legal entity nodes have not been imported

Note: Import the legal entity before importing in to Business locations

Condition A: Legal entity data was already imported before CCF functionality release

Go to “Manage Master Data” app and click on “Go to replication” and give the confirmation. System will replicate the Legal entity to the CCF server.

Condition B: Legal entity data is not available

Download the Legal entity node and Links template and maintain relevant data and import it.

Import Business location with assignment of Legal entity (Make link between the business location and Legal Entity)

Notes:

  • Manual replication of Legal entity only if user is imported Legal Entity dimension before CCF release other wise the legal entity data automatically replicated in CCF server
  • Please make sure and complete Snapshot setting If you are modified in reporting hierarchy ( Business Locations, Legal Entitles, and Reporting line)

2. Maintain Emission Factor

Emission Factor: An emission factor represents the amount of GHG emissions typically measured in CO2Equivalent (CO2-e) released per unit of specific activity or resource consumed such Fuel Combustion (Liters of Fuel burned), Electricity usage, etc.,

Example, For gasoline 2.31 KgCo2 per Liter gasoline, for Electricity 0.9 KgCO2 per KWH (Electricity generating from Coal fired boilers/Powerplant)

Data Package consist of several Data Sets for emission factors. These Data Sets provide detailed and structured information about emission factors associated with specific products, processes, or activities

Hence, we are creating only one custom dataset which consist of emission factor business travel by air. The emission factor for one kilometre per passenger is 0.158 KgCo2e

Identifier is “Z_CUST_02” Name : “Business Travel by Air”

We should release the data set only after you have entered values in all the necessary fields. Ensure that all required information (*validity period) is correctly filled in before proceeding with the release process. This helps maintain data accuracy and prevents errors or incomplete submissions

3. Create Business Activities

Define the business activities here to collect data to calculate associated GHG emissions. User can assign the business activities to different business locations

We are calculating carbon Footprint quantity based and we are using the emission factor that we created in the earlier step.

Note:

  • The user can use the preloaded emission factors if needed. However, for demonstration purposes, I have created a custom emission factor

Define the emission factor periods.

4. Manage GHG Data Collections

In this step we are going manage the recording of footprint data connected to business locations

Create the data collection for the relevant period.

We can see that the data collection form has been created for all locations. 

You have already created a data collection and recorded GHG data for a particular month, but a new business location was added later with an assigned GHG emission source, activity, or process. In this case, use the Regenerate functionality to create the GHG data forms again.  So, system again generate the GHG data forms.

We can see that the data collection form has been created for all locations. However, we can select "Set Not Applicable" if a location is not currently assigned to any GHG emission sources or activities or processes

We have set not applicable for all other location except the Los Angels and Palo Alto Plant locations.

5. Record GHG data

In this step, we can record GHG emission data for all business locations using GHG data forms. We can either import data using templates or manually enter the values (specifically quantity, since we are using a quantity-based footprint calculation).

Select a specific line item, click the Edit button, enter the quantities (total kilometers traveled in a month).

Mark Set completed and then save the changes.

The user can reopen GHG data forms to make changes, even after they have been marked as Completed or Set Not Applicable

6. Review Collected GHG Data

We need to review the collected GHG data before publishing it or making it available for detailed analysis in the "View Emission Data" app

Open the "Manage GHG Data Collections" app, select the reporting period and business locations to be reviewed, and click the Review button. The system will then review and publish the data.

Note: If the review fails, try again.

7. Analyze the Recorded GHG Data

View Emission Dashboard will give the overall trend GHG emission of organization which is including the trend of Gross GHG emission, Net Emissions, Emission avoided by Renewables, and Offset

Note:

  • Gross GHG Emissions : This represents the total amount of greenhouse gas emissions generated by an organization, facility, or activity before any reductions or offsets are applied. It includes emissions from all sources such as fuel combustion, industrial processes, and electricity consumption.
  • Net Emissions : Net emissions are the final amount of GHG emissions after accounting for reductions, such as renewable energy use and carbon offsets. It is calculated as: Net Emissions = Gross GHG Emissions - (Emission Avoided by Renewables + Offsets) This number gives a clearer picture of an organization's actual carbon footprint after mitigation efforts.
  • Emissions Avoided by Renewables: This refers to the reduction in emissions due to the use of renewable energy sources like solar, wind, or hydroelectric power. For example, if a company replaces fossil fuel-based electricity with solar power, the emissions that would have been produced are considered avoided emissions.
  • Offsets : Offsets are external projects or actions that compensate for emissions by removing or reducing GHGs elsewhere. Examples include: Investing in reforestation projects, Supporting carbon capture technologies, Purchasing carbon credits from certified programs Offsets help organizations balance out emissions they cannot eliminate directly.

If a customer wants more advanced capabilities to calculate Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions, they can use SAP Sustainability Footprint Management. If they need a more detailed breakdown of GHG combinations (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, or fluorinated gases), they can use the SAP EHSM Environment Management solution.

Thanks for reading my post.
Sreekanth

entry.title: Re: facing issue while started using BTP CLI in PowerShel...
entry.content:
Hi @gayu61295, when you run btp login, it first asks you for the BTP CLI Server URL you want to use. That is the prompt you are seeing:

CLI server URL [https://cli.btp.cloud.sap]>

Just hit Enter to confirm the default it is suggesting (https://cli.btp.cloud.sap). After that, you will be asked for you credentials to log in. After logging in, you can then run btp commands.

By the way, the btp help command also works without logging in.

Does someone have another link  for this doc or is there another way to get it?

Thanks a lot and best regards

Dear all,

my I ask if the field KNB1-PERNR is in scope for MDC in MDG on-prem? It was maintained in a scope before and was deleted. Trying to re-insert it into the scope, but it is not selectable. I did try to find official information regarding this field, but was not able to find any.

Mauri

entry.title: How run the Material ledger for FG & SFG with Price control V.
entry.content:
Dear Experts. 

One of my client is using the price control 'V' for the FG & SFG. and he will update the actual activity price in KBK6 at the month end. 

We have tested that system is not re-valuating the order with the actual activity price.

Is it possible to run the (CKMLCP) Material ledger for the price control ' V' Materials. if yes what are the configuration needs to be done.

Regards,

Santhosha BH

entry.title: SAP Business Network for Logistics 2503 Release – What’s New?
entry.content:
This blog will give you an overview of our recent release in SAP Business Network for Logistics. It is intended for shippers and solution owners, carriers, and data providers as well as sales and presales colleagues who already have a detailed understanding of SAP Business Network for Logistics. 

There are a number of exciting features out of which the following are relevant for carriers and data contributors:

  • Cross solutions: Access multiple tenants with one user account
  • Cross solutions: Reminder: Sunset of SAP BTP, Neo environment and switch to SAP BTP, Multi-Cloud environment
  • SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration: Self Book Dock Appointments app: reference document now displayed as a number
  • SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration: Manage Disputes app: view additional information for each charge
  • SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace: Provider API for Order Events (GTT): supporting time zone conversion for local time without UTC offset
  • SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace: Create Shipment Advice app: app has been sunset

But there are also great new features for shippers and solution owners such as:

  • SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace: Standard extractor codes delivered on SAP S/4HANA (supporting TM freight documents freight order, freight booking and freight unit) and
  • SAP Business Network, intelligent insights add-on: delete activated customized models in 'Manage Analytic Models' app 

Cross SAP Business Network for Logistics

Access multiple tenants with one user account

This feature has been a request from many of you. Carriers and data contributors can now use one user account (email address) to sign in to multiple tenants on the network. When signing in with a user account that is related to multiple tenants, you can switch between them from the ‘Switch Accounts’ icon in the upper-right corner.

Reminder: Sunset of SAP BTP, Neo environment and switch to SAP BTP, Multi-Cloud environment

SAP BTP, Neo environment will be deprecated on December 31st, 2025. The official support for the current integration platform running on Neo environment will be stopped on May 16th, 2025.

When you log into the 'Manage Message Log', you will now get a warning message. The link will direct you the migration guides, which are also linked below.

Please switch to the new integration platform on SAP BTP, Multi-Cloud environment!

A SAP blog post with more information is available here:
Announcement: New integration platform in SAP Business Network for Logistics

And there are also migration guides available:

  • Integration Platform Migration Guide for Shippers
  • Integration Platform Migration Guide for Carriers
  • Integration Platform Migration Guide for Solution Owners
  • Integration Platform Migration Guide for Data Contributors

Note: Data federation capabilities are supported on CPI Multi-Cloud (CF) only.

 

SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration

Dock Appointment Scheduling: reference documents now displayed as a number

The following changes were made in the carrier’s ‘Self-Book Dock Appointments’ app:

  • On the ‘Ready for Booking’ tab, a new ‘Reference Documents’ column was inserted.
  • On the ‘Booked Appointments’ tab in the ‘Reference Documents’ column, the list of reference documents was replaced by a number. When you choose the number, you can view the type and ID of each reference document.
  • As to navigate to the freight order, you now have to choose the freight order in the ‘Freight Order’ column (which used to be displayed in the ‘Reference Document’ column).

 

Similar changes were made in the shipper’s ‘Manage Dock Appointments’ app:

  • On the ‘Ready for Booking’ tab, the ‘All Reference Documents’ column was renamed to ‘Reference Documents’ and the list of reference documents was replaced by a number.
  • On the ‘Booked Appointments’ tab in the Reference Documents column, the list of reference documents was replaced by a number. When you choose the number, you can view the type and ID of each reference document.

Settlement: view additional information for each charge

In the ‘Manage Disputes’ app, in the ‘Details’ page, under the tab ‘Charges’, shippers and carriers can now view additional information for each charge.

 

 Note: This feature will only come into effect for documents that were created AFTER the feature was released.

 

 SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace

Standard extractor codes delivered on SAP S/4HANA (now supporting TM freight documents freight order, freight booking and freight unit)

​The extractor codes, provided by SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace, are now delivered as part of standard codes in SAP S/4HANA (from 2023, FPS03). They are ready to use and allow you to extract basic information in a logistical business document from SAP S/4HANA and send them to the GTT system for tracking.

​Currently, the following TM freight documents are supported for extraction:

  • Freight Order
  • Freight Booking
  • Freight Unit

You can use the Track Shipments app to monitor their fulfillment.

Please note this doesn't affect your current implementation using sample extractor codes.

​You can find more information here:

  • Prerequisites in S4HANA: https://help.sap.com/docs/business-network-global-track-and-trace/send-documents-from-erp-to-gtt/prerequisites-732581ca6d544775aaced22f246eca2e?locale=en-US
  • Migration advise guide (no step-by-step guide!) from template code to standard: https://help.sap.com/docs/business-network-global-track-and-trace/send-documents-from-erp-to-gtt/migrate-to-gtt-standard-extractor-code?locale=en-US
  • Standard enhancement framework in GTT can still be used: Enhancements to Classes and Interfaces on SAP Advanced Online Search and Customization options on GTT incl. examples https://help.sap.com/docs/business-network-global-track-and-trace/send-documents-from-erp-to-gtt/customization

‘Manage Message Logs’: display and download payload from the worklist

Upon request in customer influence portal, on the worklist page of the ‘Manage Message Logs’ application, a payload column has been added to view and download the message payload.

Provider API for Order Events (GTT): supporting time zone conversion for local time without UTC offset

Also upon customer request, carriers and data providers can now provide local time without UTC offsets in the 'Provider API for Order Event (GTT)'. In this case, you must provide corresponding event time zones as defined in IANA time zone database, the value will be automatically converted to UTC time in the system.

Location data added to email rule placeholders

When defining an email rule in the ‘Manage Models’ app, you can specify to populate the user-defined placeholder using the ‘location alternative key’. You can choose to show the information either as:

  • Text: the location alternative key will be shown in the generated email.
  • Location: you can further choose the location details from the drop-down list, such as "Email Address". As a result, the email address will be shown in the generated email.

For more, see Define the Rule on the Configuration UI.

IATA and UN/LOCODE added to core model, so it can now be saved when reporting an event

The following fields were added to the core model:

  • UN/LOCODE
  • IATA Code

When you provide this information when reporting events, it can now be saved with the event. In case the location isn’t maintained in the master data, you can still know where the next event is estimated to take place.

Public track shipments page: hide location details for certain location types

On the public track shipments page, we have reduced the location information that is shown for ‘vendors’, ‘suppliers’, ‘business partners’ and ‘customers’ to street name, city and country.

Track Shipments app: new role for data export

As of June 21, 2025, the following role template "AppStandardTrackShipmentsExportTemplate" is required to export data from the worklist. You must add it to your role collection. Otherwise, on, you won't see the export icon on the ‘Shipments Worklist’.

All fulfillment tracking apps: tiles that relate to dynamic time ranges will not display counts

If you specify a dynamic date or date range for search, such as “Last Week”, and save the result as a tile, the count won't be displayed on the tile to avoid inaccuracies.

For more about role templates, see Available Roles for Solution Owners.

All Fulfillment Tracking apps: location address displayed on the header of detail pages

On the header of ‘Detail’ pages, you can now see the addresses under their location descriptions.

Create Shipment Advice app: app has been sunset

As announced on September 21, 2024, the ‘Create Shipment Advice’ app has been sunset. It is no longer available on SAP Fiori Launchpad.

 

SAP Business Network, intelligent insights add-on

Manage Analytic Models: delete activated customized models

You can now delete an activated customized model yourself if you no longer need it. As a result, this model will disappear from the model list on the list page. In the ‘Manage Analytic Models’ app, it will no longer be available within Customized Models node either.

 

Please note that the stories that consume the model might not work properly.

 

---------------------

The above summarizes the key innovations for 2503. We hope you enjoy the new capabilities. Thanks for reading the blog post and stay tuned! 

A full overview of the 2503 release can be found under the following link.

entry.title: Re: Posting Net Pay to Two Different GL Accounts
entry.content: Balance sheet GL mapping against the employee group, not symbolic accounts. So, any other options for mapping?

entry.title: Re: how get email body for billing document all configura...
entry.content: Did you follow those steps: SD Billing output - sending SAP mail?

entry.title: How to concatenate value in Global Variable
entry.content:
1. In data from Payment, I have below data get from Odata.

<A_OperationalAcctgDocItemCube>

<A_OperationalAcctgDocItemCubeType>

<FiscalYear>2025</FiscalYear>

<Customer>15100100</Customer>

<PostingDate>2025-02-06T00:00:00.000</PostingDate>

<AmountInTransactionCurrency>40000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>

<AccountingDocument>1800000006</AccountingDocument>

<DocumentDate>2025-02-08T00:00:00.000</DocumentDate>

<CompanyCode>1510</CompanyCode>

<AccountingDocumentItem>1</AccountingDocumentItem>

<TransactionCurrency>JPY</TransactionCurrency>

</A_OperationalAcctgDocItemCubeType>

</A_OperationalAcctgDocItemCube>

2. I use General Splitter for the result of data as I want to work with each record of "A_OperationalAcctgDocItemCubeType".

3. In Assign Invoice data, I get the AccountingDocument and AmountInTransactionCurrency and assign the value to the Property variable.

4. I call another odata by using the filter value of AccountingDocument get in step-3.

5. I use Write Variable to store the data.

6. I use Router and if there is data in Step-5, it will goes to next step and if no data, it will end.

7. I used Groovy script to update the Variable declared in Step-5. Below is my groovy script. I want to concatenate the InvoiceID used in step-5 with the InvoiceID get from Property.

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;

def Message processData(Message message) {

    def currentPartialID = message.getProperty("InvoiceID")

    def existingIDs = message.getProperty("PartialInvoiceID") ?: ""

    existingIDs = existingIDs.tokenize(',') // Convert string to list

    if (!existingIDs.contains(currentPartialID)) {

        existingIDs.add(currentPartialID) // Append only if new

    }

    message.setProperty("PartialInvoiceID", existingIDs.join(',')) // Convert list back to string

    return message;

}

 

But when I run my process, the PartialInvoiceID is not concatenate with the InvoiceID and it resets the value when one splitter is finished. And assign only one value.

Is there any way that I can concatenate the PartialInvoiceID?

E.g 
What I want
After 1st Splitter > PartialInvoiceID = 1400000006
After 2nd Splitter > PartialInvoiceID = 1400000006,1400000007
After 3rd Splitter > PartialInvoiceID =  1400000006,1400000007, 1400000008
 
What I get
After 1st Splitter > PartialInvoiceID = 1400000006
After 2nd Splitter > PartialInvoiceID = 1400000007
After 3rd Splitter > PartialInvoiceID =  1400000008

entry.title: Re: Funds Management (PSM-FM) activation and deactivation
entry.content:
Hi, Vanessa,

Thanks for this blog. This is very helpful to understand the implications and Deactivation process.

Can someone help me with PSM-FM configuration document. 

My Email Id: tokala.fico@gmail.com

Thanks in Advance.

Best Regards,

Sreehari.

entry.title: SAP BTP Developer's Guide: Now Featuring CAP Java Tutorials!
entry.content:
Great news for Java developers!  The SAP BTP Developer's Guide now features hands-on tutorials for CAP Java-based incident management.

With the latest update, you’ll learn how to build, deploy, and optimize incident management apps using CAP Java—following SAP BTP best practices. Time to level up your skills and ship better apps!

Tutorials : Develop a Full-Stack CAP Application Following SAP BTP Developer’s Guide 
Github: Incident Management Java

Following the tutorials you will learn the following:

  • How to create a CAP project
  • How to add a domain model
  • How to create services
  • How to add data to your database

Domain Model of the application: 

using { cuid, managed, sap.common.CodeList } from '@sap/cds/common';
namespace sap.capire.incidents; 

/**
* Incidents created by Customers.
*/
entity Incidents : cuid, managed {  
customer     : Association to Customers;
title        : String  @title : 'Title';
urgency        : Association to Urgency default 'M';
status         : Association to Status default 'N';
conversation  : Composition of many {
    key ID    : UUID;
    timestamp : type of managed:createdAt;
    author    : type of managed:createdBy;
    message   : String;
};
}

/**
* Customers entitled to create support Incidents.
*/
entity Customers : managed { 
key ID        : String;
firstName     : String;
lastName      : String;
name          : String = firstName ||' '|| lastName;
email         : EMailAddress;
phone         : PhoneNumber;
incidents     : Association to many Incidents on incidents.customer = $self;
creditCardNo  : String(16) @assert.format: '^[1-9]\d{15}$';
addresses     : Composition of many Addresses on addresses.customer = $self;
}

entity Addresses : cuid, managed {
customer      : Association to Customers;
city          : String;
postCode      : String;
streetAddress : String;
}

entity Status : CodeList {
key code: String enum {
    new = 'N';
    assigned = 'A'; 
    in_process = 'I'; 
    on_hold = 'H'; 
    resolved = 'R'; 
    closed = 'C'; 
};
criticality : Integer;
}

entity Urgency : CodeList {
key code: String enum {
    high = 'H';
    medium = 'M'; 
    low = 'L'; 
};
}

type EMailAddress : String;
type PhoneNumber : String;

Here's some code snippet from the JAVA custom handler: 

package customer.incident_management.handler;

import cds.gen.processorservice.Incidents;
import cds.gen.processorservice.ProcessorService_;
import cds.gen.sap.capire.incidents.*;
import com.sap.cds.ql.Select;
import com.sap.cds.services.ErrorStatuses;
import com.sap.cds.services.ServiceException;
import com.sap.cds.services.cds.CqnService;
import com.sap.cds.services.handler.EventHandler;
import com.sap.cds.services.handler.annotations.Before;
import com.sap.cds.services.handler.annotations.ServiceName;
import com.sap.cds.services.persistence.PersistenceService;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Locale;

@Component
@ServiceName(ProcessorService_.CDS_NAME)
public class ProcessorServiceHandler implements EventHandler {

    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ProcessorServiceHandler.class);

    private final PersistenceService db;

    public ProcessorServiceHandler(PersistenceService db) {
        this.db = db;
    }

    /*
     * Change the urgency of an incident to "high" if the title contains the word "urgent"
     */
    @Before(event = CqnService.EVENT_CREATE)
    public void ensureHighUrgencyForIncidentsWithUrgentInTitle(List<Incidents> incidents) {
        for (Incidents incident : incidents) {
            if (incident.getTitle().toLowerCase(Locale.ENGLISH).contains("urgent") &&
                    incident.getUrgencyCode() == null || !incident.getUrgencyCode().equals("H")) {
                incident.setUrgencyCode("H");
                logger.info("Adjusted Urgency for incident '{}' to 'HIGH'.", incident.getTitle());
            }

        }
    }

    /*
     * Handler to avoid updating a "closed" incident
     */
    @Before(event = CqnService.EVENT_UPDATE)
    public void ensureNoUpdateOnClosedIncidents(Incidents incident) {
        Incidents in = db.run(Select.from(Incidents_.class).where(i -> i.ID().eq(incident.getId()))).single(Incidents.class);
        if (in.getStatusCode().equals("C")) {
            throw new ServiceException(ErrorStatuses.CONFLICT, "Can't modify a closed incident");
        }

    }

}

This is your cue to clone the repo or dive into the tutorial and discover the elegance of CAP Java!

Once your application is ready, level up your development workflow by learning how to set up a robust CI/CD pipeline. This will help you automate testing, deployment, and delivery, ensuring smooth and efficient software releases!

The next part: Set Up a CI/CD Pipeline for SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry Runtime . 

Keep Learning!

Java  SAP Cloud Application Programming Model  SAP Business Application Studio
